title: Trith prancer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Trith prancers''' were domesticated riding animals that had been gradually [[Bioengineering/Legends|genetically engineered]] since around [[25,000 BBY/Legends|25,000 BBY]]. They had smooth [[Color/Legends|gray-blue]] fur, six [[Limb/Legends|legs]], and a back that served as a natural saddle with upward-jutting shoulder [[Bone/Legends|bones]]. They made [[Flute/Legends|flute]]-like noises.

[[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]] owned three and enjoyed riding them at his [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] residence.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
